2.0.0.0.added:
- HasTags (checks if a passage has tags)
- LoopTagIndex
- TagsAmount
- OnAnyVariableChanged
- LastChangedVariable
- Support for calling and evaluating Ink functions
2.0.0.0.changed:
- Ported to SDK V2
- CheckTags condition is now CheckTagExists
- VariableChanged is now OnVariableChanged
2.0.0.0.fixed:
- Deprecated KeyValueTag
- Fixed an update issue with observing variables
